business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

coverages_discussed.coverage_type: Commercial Property / Building and Personal Property Coverage Form
coverages_discussed.current_limit: Building: 222340000; Contents: 33432000; Business Income: 59212000; Coinsurance: 90%; Deductible: 50000
coverages_discussed.notes: Policy form CP 00 10 10 12. Coverage part premium shown as 403697.14. Producer: Texas Commercial Insurance Partners.

Endorsement CP 04 05 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Provides Coverage A for loss to the undamaged portion of the building due to enforcement of ordinance or law requiring demolition after a covered cause of loss.

Endorsement CP 04 09 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Covers direct physical loss or damage to Covered Property caused by or resulting from an Equipment Breakdown accident to mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment.

Endorsement CP 04 17 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Covers direct physical loss or damage to Covered Property caused by interruption of utility services, including water supply, communication supply, and power supply services.

document_info.document_type: Commercial Property Policy - Building and Personal Property Coverage Form

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: SIC Code: 6512 Description: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

concerns: Commercial real estate portfolio includes office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas.
Policy includes a 50000 deductible and 90% coinsurance requirement.
Vacancy condition may restrict or reduce coverage if a building has been vacant for more than 60 consecutive days.
positives: Large scheduled property limits are provided for Building, Contents, and Business Income.
Endorsements include Ordinance Or Law Coverage, Equipment Breakdown Coverage, and Utility Services — Direct Damage.
Business description indicates an established commercial real estate investment and property management operation.
